Website Parasite:
Ebay
About eBay:
System Description: This is a proven system for getting targeted
traffic through eBay’s network of buyers.
Required Skills: Some knowledge of HTML is helpful and
if the ad needs to be written, copywriting experience is also
a plus.
System Checklist:
Step 1: Create an eBay Account, Video 1
Step 2: Set up Your About Me Page, Video 2
1. Copy HTML from your existing squeeze or sales page.
2. Remove Javascript and iframes from code to comply
with eBay’s terms of service.
3. Remove dynamic links from page to comply with
eBay’s terms of service.
4. Make sure graphics are hosted on another server.
5. Import code into your About Me page.
Step 3: Set up Sellathon and Statcounter, Videos 3 and 4
1. Create accounts with Sellathon and Statcounter.
2. Put Statcounter code on your About Me page to
Weekly Action Plan:
Day 1 Task Checklist:
Create an eBay account.
Create accounts with Sella-
thon and Statcounter.
Create an About Me page.
Day 2 Task Checklist:
Perform keyword research.
Day 3 Task Checklist:
Post classified ad via Tur-
bolister.
Post auction via Turbolister.
Day 4 Task Checklist:
Set up an eBay Store if you
are selling more than one
product.

-- 1 of 3 --

System Checklist:	Weekly Action Plan:
Check for questions or
orders.
Fulfill orders.
Day 5 Task Checklist:
Track your results.
Check for questions or
orders.
Fulfill orders.
track visitors (use the HTML version, not Java).
Step 4: Research Keywords, Video 5
1. Use Google Adwords keyword tool to find keywords
with high search volume.
2. Type keywords in ebay to determine competition.
3. Choose four to five keyword combinations within
55 characters.
Step 5: Write Copy and Create Graphics, Video 6
1. Create an eye-catching gallery graphic.
2. Write a catchy headline and subtitle within 55
characters.
Step 6: Post an Auction Using Turbolister, Video 7
1. Install and set up the Turbolister software.
2. Set the auction to run every seven days and schedule
it for Sunday.
3. Set the initial price to $.99 to attract more bidders.
4. If you’re importing an existing sales page, use the
instructions in the “About Me” page video to make
the code eBay compliant.
5. Add the Sellathon code to the HTML of the page.
6. Put your keyword combination in the title of
your ad.
7. Put your subtitle in the “Subtitle” section of your ad.
8. Submit the auction.
Step 7: Post a Classified Ad Using Turbolister, Video 8
1. Use the same steps as posting an auction, except
choose the “Classified Ad” format in the options.
Official eBay Site:
www.eBay.com
Analytics Site for eBay:
www.Sellathon.com
About Me Page Counter Site:
www.StatCounter.com
Resources:

-- 2 of 3 --

Step 8: Interpret Your Results, Video 9
Step 9: Set up an eBay Store, Video 10
1. Set up your products in an eBay store if you are run-
ning multiple auctions or classified ads.
System Checklist:	Quick Tip:
We’ve always had high
conversions with eBay traffic
since most people are on
eBay to buy something (as
opposed to people typing in
search queries into Google
who are just researching most
of the time). It is also helpful
to have as many auctions as
possible running since many
eBayers will browse your
other auctions - which can
lead to more sales.

-- 3 of 3 --
